subject: Discovery: Test other interactive features
description:
Explore other Claude Code interactive features to identify all event types that support user responses.

Features to test:
1. Tool result confirmation prompts (if any)
2. Dangerous operation warnings (e.g., force push, rm -rf)
3. Multi-step approval workflows
4. Context boundary prompts ("Continue with large file?")

Files: internal/tui/claude/events.go (keep logging)

Deliverable:
- Complete inventory of interactive event types
- Event schema documentation for each type
- Response protocol patterns identified

Acceptance:
- [ ] All major interactive features tested
- [ ] Event types catalogued with examples
- [ ] Common response patterns identified
- [ ] Edge cases documented
